title: The Silence Between Us
content: After a small argument, Sophie and Ethan stopped calling each other. Days became weeks, and the silence felt heavier than the disagreement itself. Both wanted to apologize but kept waiting for the other person to make the first move. Finally, Ethan visited the park where they often met. Sophie was already there, sitting on their favorite bench. Neither spoke immediately. Then Ethan quietly said, “I missed talking to you.” Sophie smiled with relief. They learned that honest conversations are much easier than carrying unnecessary silence.
